mapper.sql: id, api_name, api_path, task_id, api_key, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_open_api ( api_name, api_path, task_id, api_key, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{apiName}, #{apiPath}, #{taskId}, #{apiKey}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE df_open_api SET api_name = #{apiName}, api_path = #{apiPath}, task_id = #{taskId}, api_key = #{apiKey}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM df_open_api WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM df_open_api WHERE api_path = #{apiPath} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM df_open_api WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
